candidate_archival_state.archival_reason: REJECT_FAST at P10 OOS via DR4 (oos_negative_while_is_positive); IS+cost-stress passed but the trend edge did not generalize OOS

central_finding.framework_validation: s16 got the FURTHEST of the s14/s15/s16 line (first to pass IS, first to pass cost-stress, first to reach the OOS gate). The phased ladder + OOS gate did exactly their job: they prevented a false-positive IS result from being treated as a real edge. No gate was relaxed to rescue it.
central_finding.headline: A positive in-sample edge that survives full cost-stress is NECESSARY but NOT SUFFICIENT; the OOS gate (DR4) is the binding generalization test, and it caught a strategy that looked strong in-sample but did not generalize.
central_finding.is_vs_oos_divergence: IS net +$17,129.69 (sharpe_proxy +0.0563, win 34.67%/P-L 2.2191) -> OOS net $-2,837.19 (sharpe_proxy -0.0311, win 33.83%/P-L 1.8019). The trend geometry (win<50%/P-L>1) was RETAINED OOS, but the edge magnitude flipped negative.
central_finding.regime_dependence: The 2019-2023 IS edge was regime-specific to a strong large-cap/tech uptrend. In the 2024-2025 OOS window, defensive/staples names trended (KO +$3,897, WMT +$2,938) while tech/energy reversed or whipsawed (AMZN -$2,049, CVX -$3,106, JNJ -$2,442, META -$1,239, JPM -$1,260), netting negative.

diagnostic_only_disclosure: The strategy remains DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY and is NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, and NOT FRC-granted. Trading remains PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. No promotion of any kind.

lessons_eligible_for_lessons_md_in_a_sep: LESSON_S16_D1_004 (eligible; NOT written): A positive in-sample edge that survives full cost-stress (S0-S4) is necessary but NOT sufficient; DR4 (oos_negative_while_is_positive) is the binding generalization gate. s16 passed IS + cost-stress yet failed OOS -- the OOS gate is where false positives are caught.

LESSON_S16_D1_005 (eligible; NOT written): Trend-following edges are regime-dependent. The 2019-2023 large-cap uptrend edge did not carry to 2024-2025: defensive/staples (KO/WMT) trended OOS while tech/energy reversed. A trend candidate's IS window regime must be weighed against the OOS regime; in-sample trend strength is not portable.

LESSON_S16_D1_006 (eligible; NOT written): The phased ladder (PLAN->SEAL->BUILD->P4->P6->P6.5->P7->P10) plus the OOS gate functioned as designed -- s16 advanced furthest of the line precisely because it earned each gate, and the OOS gate terminated it honestly without any gate relaxation.
WARNING (eligible; NOT written): lessons would be written only under a separate explicit authorization. This P11 does NOT touch lessons.md.

inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the 12-name basket (expected ~96-180/y). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.

EXIT/STOP-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING; trend variant): exit = TRAILING DONCHIAN channel (N_exit=10; let winners run/cut losers) + 2xATR(14) initial catastrophe stop. Opposite geometry to the failed mean-reversion family; expected trend profile win<50% / P/L>1. Hypothesis tested at P6 IS, never assumed.
DA4=B: START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin for cash equity
exit/stop-first-principles + K9-reachability + DR10-v2-reachability disciplines applied at PLAN+DRAFT; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family Donchian breakout trend (trailing-stop), NON-mean-reversion, LOCKED at PLAN
Donchian params N_entry=20 / N_exit=10 / ATR(14) 2N initial stop first-principles; to be JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED at SEAL
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
12-name expanded cross-sector universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 12 by REUSE (sealed 245ac0d; result_seal ec856253...); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent

A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (12 names ~7 sectors; expected higher A7 / lower K10 than 3-name basket); NOT the candidate's risk axis (per-trade trend edge K1/K2 is)
s15-d1 + s14-d1-cross-sector terminal (FAIL_SAFETY) preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH NON-mean-reversion; clears T-FORBID-16/17/18
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched
P6 IS PASS (if reached) does NOT imply READY at OOS; P6 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent

report_kind: S16-D1 P11 lifecycle decision memo: formalizes the TERMINAL disposition. The candidate passed P6 IS (positive edge) and P6.5 (edge survived full cost-stress) but FAILED the P10 OOS gate -- DR4 oos_negative_while_is_positive fired (OOS net -$2,837.19 while IS was +$17,129.69) -> REJECT_FAST. IS+cost-stress success is necessary but NOT sufficient; DR4 (OOS generalization) is the binding gate. DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; never live.

terminal_driver.name: oos_negative_while_is_positive_unexplained
terminal_driver.precedence_note: DR4 sits at OOS in the precedence chain; it is the canonical generalization gate. K9 OOS was SATISFIED (133 trades ~67/y), so this is a genuine edge-generalization failure, not a sample problem.

title: s16-d1 expanded-universe Donchian trend P11 lifecycle decision memo (sealed; binding; candidate-lifecycle TERMINAL by REJECT_FAST/DR4 at P10 OOS)
what_this_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate trend-following is universally non-viable; THIS sealed spec (Donchian-20/10 + 2xATR) on THIS 12-name basket over THIS OOS window failed to generalize.
It does NOT demonstrate a K9/sample problem (OOS 133 trades ~67/y; ample).
It does NOT demonstrate the IS or cost-stress analysis was wrong (they were correct; the edge simply did not persist OOS).
It does NOT condemn the 12-name universe or split_only data (DR9-passed, reused, intact).
